runners.formComment: Strong performance after racing just off the speed to win by one length at this track over 366m (20.04) beating Out The Bottle in Mix 5 on April 8. Looks the one to beat again.

runners.formComment: Ended last campaign with a fifth (20.55) in a MX 5 at this track and returns after a 11 weeks break. Yet to win but has placed from two first-up runs. Worth including among the chances.
